body.ab:
(Greek letters+magic charaktéres)
(Greek letters+magic charaktéres)
(Greek letters+magic charaktéres)
[Guar]d Ada son of Marthana, Amen, Amen, Selah.
[In the name ofl God, the holy, our God, the God, our God, the God of hosts -
[...]swr) )brtn hyd )brtn wb) dymnhmnws
[...]t) qq ddwsh )nnwn )nwtw )ggn bryh 1b
[...] )dwnh) s)lm smslm
[...]t )qr) m)kh mry )bln) tn)lb)
[ ] mrbb)l )str) qpqh - redeem
[and] guard Ada son of Marthana from every evil pain, Amen.
d[w]qwn dyqwn dyqnwn )ystrqtwn. In the name of the seven holy
angels which every spirit and plague-demons are given in their hands, I adjure
against a spirit that comes upon Ada son of Marthana that you shall not harm him, that where[ever]
these names will be read (any spirit) will not remain. I write (it) and (then) the fever will be eradicated.
(magic charaktéres) pt ()
